title: Count Vowel Strings in Ranges
titleCn: 统计范围内的元音字符串数

testcases.input: words = ["aba","bcb","ece","aa","e"], queries = [[0,2],[1,4],[1,1]] Output: [2,3,0] Explanation: The strings starting and ending with a vowel are "aba", "ece", "aa" and "e". The answer to the query [0,2] is 2 (strings "aba" and "ece"). to query [1,4] is 3 (strings "ece", "aa", "e"). to query [1,1] is 0. We return [2,3,0].
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,3,0] Explanation: The strings starting and ending with a vowel are "aba", "ece", "aa" and "e". The answer to the query [0,2] is 2 (strings "aba" and "ece"). to query [1,4] is 3 (strings "ece", "aa", "e"). to query [1,1] is 0. We return [2,3,0].

testcases.input: words = ["a","e","i"], queries = [[0,2],[0,1],[2,2]] Output: [3,2,1] Explanation: Every string satisfies the conditions, so we return [3,2,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,2,1] Explanation: Every string satisfies the conditions, so we return [3,2,1].
